channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Thai tanker safely transits Strait of Hormuz after talks with Iran
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Says ‘Non-Hostile’ Ships Can Sail Through the Strait of Hormuz
- Iran drafts law to impose tolls for transiting Strait of Hormuz
- Strait of Hormuz situation ‘will not return to the past,’ Iran says amid escalating Mideast tensions
- Iran’s ‘Tehran toll booth’: Legally risky route for shippers through Strait of Hormuz
- Iran claims Hormuz control, law says shared waterway
- Iran calls for sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz in fresh list of demands, rejects Trump's proposal as ‘excessive’
- Iran says non-hostile vessels entitled to safe passage through strait of Hormuz with coordination
- Iran demands crew, cargo details to send ships through Hormuz
- As Pakistan pitches to mediate, Iran turns back Karachi-bound ship at Strait of Hormuz over 'lack of permission'
- China-owned vessel secures rare Strait of Hormuz transit as Iran war grinds on
- Iran says will 'absolutely' continue charging vessels for Hormuz passage
- US reportedly sends peace plan as Iran opens Strait of Hormuz to ‘non-hostile’ oil vessels
- Iran says ‘non-hostile’ ships can pass safely through Strait of Hormuz
- Iran tells UN: 'non-hostile' ships can transit Strait of Hormuz
- Iran to allow 'non-hostile' ships through Hormuz, excludes US-linked vessels
- Trump sends peace plan as Iran opens Strait of Hormuz to ‘non-hostile’ oil vessels
- Strait of Hormuz closure means this port could be a key lifeline for the Persian Gulf
- Iran says ‘non-hostile’ ships can pass safely through Strait of Hormuz]]>

- Iraq to summon U.S. diplomat over deadly strike on military clinic]]>

item.title: Iranian missile attacks intensify over Israel after brief lull
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran Signals Resilience With Volley of Missiles Across Middle East
- Iran fires missile salvo after Trump signals progress in talks
- Iran’s missiles pierce Israel’s defenses, raising doubts about interceptors
- How well armed is Iran, and can it replenish missiles?
- How well armed is Iran — and can it replenish missiles?
- Iran Fires Missile Salvo After Trump Signals Progress In Talks
- Iran fires missile salvo after Trump signals progress in talks]]>
